mapper.select: SELECT id, dict_type, label, value, color_type, css_class, sort_no, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM jq_sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, dict_type, label, value, color_type, css_class, sort_no, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM jq_sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
